opportunities.title: Godzilla Just Joined a d20 Game — Here's Why Your Kaiju Stat Blocks Still Suck
opportunities.why_now: Marvel Multiverse RPG's Godzilla announcement gives a hook to rip apart lazy legendary-action design and show the fix.
opportunities.angle: Creature tactic short: build a proper kaiju using legendary resistance, lair actions, and a scaled saving throw DC, then reflavor for 5e/Shadowdark

opportunities.title: Sly Flourish's 'Adventure Types' Are Missing the One That Actually Kills Sessions
opportunities.why_now: Fresh Rise of the Lazy Gamemaster breakdown just dropped, ripe for a veteran-GM counterpoint before it gets stale.
opportunities.angle: Dry rebuttal/ruling short: name the missing adventure type (the logistics/travel grind) and give a one-line fix GMs can use tonight

opportunities.title: Deathbringer RPG's Death Rule vs. 5e Death Saves: Which One Actually Kills PCs?
opportunities.why_now: Professor Dungeon Master's interview on Deathbringer just published, giving a timely comparison point for a crunchy system-vs-system take.
opportunities.angle: Rules ruling short: walk through Deathbringer's death mechanic, then show the 5e death-save loophole it exposes

opportunities.title: Arcana Unleashed's New Backgrounds: One Feature Worth Stealing, Rest Is Filler
opportunities.why_now: Podcast #406 just teased Arcana Unleashed's background overhaul, timely for a quick verdict before the book drops.
opportunities.angle: Spell/feature use-case short: isolate the single background feature with real mechanical teeth and show a table it actually helps

opportunities.title: The $500 Deadfall Box Set Has One Mechanic Worth Ripping Off For Free
opportunities.why_now: The Deadfall box set just got livestreamed at $500, so audiences want to know what's actually inside before dismissing it as a cash grab.
opportunities.angle: Dry veteran-GM teardown: pull one usable subsystem (e.g., a faction/downtime mechanic) and show how to bolt it onto 5e/DCC without buying the box
